name: SECURITY FEDERAL CORP
business: Security Federal Corporation is a bank holding company whose principal business is accepting deposits from the general public and originating commercial real estate loans, residential mortgage loans, construction loans, commercial and agricultural business loans, and consumer loans. The company operates primarily in South Carolina and Georgia through its subsidiary Security Federal Bank.
sellsTo: Individuals and businesses in Aiken, Lexington, Richland, and Saluda counties in South Carolina
Individuals and businesses in Columbia and Richmond counties in Georgia
